versions.description: DayZ chat commands. Provides /visit <name> (teleport to a party member) and /bag (teleport to your most recent death location). Requires the @TakaroIntegration mod on the DayZ server.

commands.name: visit
commands.helpText: Teleport to a player in your Expansion party. Usage: /visit <name>

arguments.name: target
arguments.helpText: Name (or partial name) of the player to visit. Must be in your Expansion party.

commands.name: bag
commands.helpText: Teleport to your most recent death location to recover your loot.

commands.name: sethome
commands.helpText: Save your current location as your home. Use /home to teleport back.

commands.name: home
commands.helpText: Teleport to your saved home. Use /sethome to set a home first.
